Wed Oct  8 07:27:20 2025

california_migration_test():
  python version: 3.10.12
  numpy version:  1.26.4
  matplotlib version: 3.5.1
  Suppose that every year, 30% of California moves out
  and 10% of the US moves into California.
  Suppose in 1960 California had 16,000,000 residents,
  and the rest of the US had 164,000,000 residents.
  Predict the California population for the next 20 years.

  Go "backwards" in time using np.linalg.solve()
